category.scope_note: Radio and telecom terminal equipment exported from China to Bhutan under BICMA type approval and BSB standards

title.en: Exporting Wireless Devices from China to Bhutan — BICMA Type Approval & BSB Requirements
title.zh: 中国无线设备出口至不丹——BICMA型号核准及BSB合规要求
title.zht: 中國無線設備出口至不丹——BICMA型號核准及BSB合規要求

description.en: Regulatory requirements for wireless and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into Bhutan, including BICMA type approval, BSB electrical safety, local importer rules, and the Bhutan Information, Communications and Media Act 2018.
description.zh: 在不丹销售或进口无线及电信终端设备的合规要求，包括BICMA型号核准、BSB电气安全、当地进口商规定及2018年《不丹信息、通信与媒体法》。
description.zht: 在不丹銷售或進口無線及電信終端設備的合規要求，包括BICMA型號核准、BSB電氣安全、當地進口商規定及2018年《不丹資訊、通訊與媒體法》。

disclaimer.en: This dataset is AI-generated for informational purposes only and has not been verified by a licensed regulatory specialist. Requirements may change; always consult BICMA, BSB, and a qualified local importer before commercialising in Bhutan.
disclaimer.zh: 本数据集由AI生成，仅供参考，未经持牌监管专家核实。要求可能变更，在不丹商业化前请务必咨询BICMA、BSB及合资格当地进口商。
disclaimer.zht: 本數據集由AI生成，僅供參考，未經持牌監管專家核實。要求可能變更，在不丹商業化前請務必諮詢BICMA、BSB及合資格當地進口商。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices exported from China to Bhutan require a separate BICMA type approval — CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognised. A Bhutanese authorised importer (typically Thimphu-based) must be appointed before importation. BSB electrical safety and EMC testing apply, and the Bhutan Information, Communications and Media Act 2018 governs cybersecurity obligations.
answer_first.zh: 从中国出口至不丹的无线设备需单独申请BICMA型号核准——CE、FCC及CCC标志均不获认可。进口前须委任不丹授权进口商（通常位于廷布）。须符合BSB电气安全及EMC检测要求，2018年《不丹信息、通信与媒体法》规范网络安全义务。
answer_first.zht: 從中國出口至不丹的無線設備需單獨申請BICMA型號核准——CE、FCC及CCC標誌均不獲認可。進口前須委任不丹授權進口商（通常位於廷布）。須符合BSB電氣安全及EMC檢測要求，2018年《不丹資訊、通訊與媒體法》規範網路安全義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: flag-and-reverify on any BICMA or BSB regulatory update
